summary: User Lookup | Single Date Selection Validation
gherkin:
When the user navigate to User Lookup page
And the user click on "Select A Date Range" button
And the user Select today's date in the calendar
And the user Verify only one date is selected (not a range)
And the user Enter "dm5tv@gmail.com" in the email field
And the user Click on Search button
And the user Verify search results are displayed
Then the user Lookup page loads successfully
And the Calendar dropdown appears
And Today's date is selected and displayed
And Single date is shown, no range indicators present
And the Email address is entered successful
And the Search executes successful
And the user should see the User Information and User Sessions tables are shown

steps.action:
*When* the user navigate to User Lookup page

*And* the user click on "Select A Date Range" button

*And* the user Select today's date in the calendar

*And* the user Verify only one date is selected (not a range)

*And* the user Enter "[dm5tv@gmail.com|mailto:dm5tv@gmail.com]" in the email field

*And* the user Click on Search button

*And* the user Verify search results are displayed
steps.result:
*Then* the user Lookup page loads successfully

*And* the Calendar dropdown appears

*And* Today's date is selected and displayed

*And* Single date is shown, no range indicators present

*And* the Email address is entered successful

*And* the Search executes successful

*And* the user should see the User Information and User Sessions tables are shown
